description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a dense ring of mature trees, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The structure features a flat roof and a combination of large glass windows and solid wall sections, giving it a contemporary look. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a paved path leading up to it, and a driveway that suggests the presence of a garage. The exterior materials appear to be a mix of wood, stone, and glass, with a neutral color palette of browns, whites, and grays. The layout is low and sprawling, with a single story and an open, accessible design. The presence of a porch or covered entry area is visible, enhancing the welcoming aspect of the home.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of wood, stone, and glass, surrounded by mature trees.
description_view_0: The bungalow is partially obscured by trees, with the roof and some windows visible, highlighting the open backyard or rear patio area.
description_view_1: The front of the bungalow is visible, showing the main entrance, driveway, and a clear view of the facade with large windows and a porch.
description_view_2: The rear or side of the bungalow is shown, with a focus on the backyard area and additional windows, framed by trees.
description_view_3: A side perspective reveals the elongated structure, more windows, and the integration of the building with the surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and sides
